title: Yellow Jacket Removal in Yonkers, NY | $350-$550

intro: Yellow jackets pose a serious threat to Yonkers residents, especially during late summer when colonies peak in aggression. Our experienced technicians provide fast, safe yellow jacket nest removal throughout Westchester's fourth-largest city, protecting families in neighborhoods from Nodine Hill to Getty Square. We handle nests in walls, eaves, ground cavities, and other difficult locations common in Yonkers' diverse housing stock.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of yellow jacket removal experience to Yonkers, with licensed technicians who understand the unique challenges of Westchester properties. We offer same-day emergency service, transparent pricing from $350-$550, and a satisfaction guarantee that has made us the trusted choice for homeowners and businesses throughout the Hudson River corridor.

From Untermyer Park and Gardens to the bustling Ridge Hill shopping complex, our team knows every neighborhood and responds quickly to protect your property and family.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service throughout Yonkers and Westchester for emergency yellow jacket situations. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call during peak season.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 yellow jacket removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, nest location and identification, professional-grade treatment, nest removal when accessible, and a follow-up guarantee. The final cost depends on nest size, location difficulty, and height requirements. We provide upfront quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to my Yonkers family?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are aggressive defenders of their nests and can sting multiple times, unlike honeybees. They're particularly dangerous in late summer and early fall when colonies are largest. Those with allergies face serious health risks, making professional removal essential for your family's safety.

faqs.question: Do you service all Yonkers neighborhoods for yellow jacket removal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We service all Yonkers areas including downtown, Nodine Hill, Crestwood, Ludlow, Riverdale-on-Hudson, Getty Square, Park Hill, and everywhere in between. Our team is familiar with both residential properties and commercial buildings throughout the entire city.
